name: 50,000 First Dates: A True Story
overview: When memory is destroyed and logic gone, is intuition enough to fall in love (again, and again, and again)? This series is the dramatic, almost unbelievable true story of Nesh Pillay, a 32-year-old woman who mysteriously lost the last 15 years of her memory, including recollection of her fiancé.

trailers.title: 50,000 First Dates - Official Trailer | Prime Video
